subject: fix(review): address issues found during 12-point review
body:
Fixes from systematic review of all changes on this branch:

- Security: Scrubbed graphiki README — removed git clone URL to
  private repo, dev setup commands, project structure, configuration
- Accuracy: Fixed budgy-ting tech stack (added Vue 3) on landing page
  and README
- Rendering: Added nested list support to markdown renderer
- Print: Added @media print rules to project.html (hide tabs/actions,
  break-inside-avoid on cards)
- Accessibility: Added :focus-visible outline styles
- Doc consistency: Added sun-sea-o to README project list, updated
  project structure to include project.html, public/projects/, and
  new docs files. Updated SESSION_NOTES and HISTORY.

Tags: review, fix, accessibility, security, docs
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch
